# Admissions Tracker — Skill Documentation

## Overview

Real-time application management workflow for tracking all 4 schools with:
- Deadline alerts (7/14/30 days)
- School-specific checklists
- Blocker detection and resolution
- Progress visualization
- Critical path identification

## What's Included

- **SKILL.md** — Main workflow definition
- **templates/** — TRACKER template, checklists, alerts, progress summaries
- **examples/** — Example TRACKER, school checklists, alert outputs
- **reference/** — Application timeline, critical path guide, status symbols

## How to Use

1. Start the skill: Type `/admissions-tracker` in Copilot chat
2. Daily: Spend 5 minutes checking TRACKER.md
3. Weekly: Generate deadline alert and progress summary
4. Monthly: Full strategic review and recalibration

## Key Files

- `templates/tracker-template.md` — Structure for TRACKER.md
- `examples/tracker-june-2026.md` — See how it looks in practice
- `reference/critical-path-guide.md` — What items truly matter
- `reference/school-deadlines-2026.md` — Actual deadlines

## Progressive Enhancements (Coming)

- Calendar integration (Phase 2)
- Automatic email reminders (Phase 2)
- Slack integration (Phase 2)
- Critical path analysis (Phase 3)
- Velocity tracking (Phase 3)
- Risk scoring (Phase 4)
- Timeline forecasting (Phase 4)
